name: codex-science
description: A one-stop auditable research concierge from question to reproducible handoff

interface.shortDescription: One-stop research from goal to auditable handoff
interface.longDescription: Act as a research concierge that coordinates question framing, scientific metadata, literature, datasets, preregistered experiments, compute, reproducible artifacts, manuscripts, evaluations, review, bounded improvement loops, and final handoff through one guided workflow.
defaultPrompt: Act as my one-stop research concierge: take my goal and coordinate the full auditable workflow.
Inspect my existing research project, show the real status, and continue the highest-value next step.
Turn my evidence, data, and analysis into a reproducible publication-ready handoff.
